nasb.text: “The remainder, 5,000 cubits in width and 25,000 in length, shall be for common use for the city, for dwellings and for open spaces; and the city shall be in its midst.

esv.text: “The remainder, 5,000 cubits in breadth and 25,000 in length, shall be for common use for the city, for dwellings and for open country. In the midst of it shall be the city,

cnv.text: “所剩下的地，寬兩公里半，長十二公里半，要作俗地，供城市、居民和郊野之用。城要在其中。

ccb.text: “剩下的十二点五公里长、二点五公里宽的地方是公用的，用来建城邑、房屋和草场，城要建在地的中央。
